notes: Curated district-aligned GLB intake shortlist. direct_gltf means glTF/glb-ready upstream, convert_to_glb means source pack should be normalized into the local GLB pipeline, catalog_export means pick per-model exports during intake review.

candidates.role: hero lounge props and waypoint chrome
candidates.notes: Useful as immediate polished glTF filler for hub staging while bespoke portal kit grows.

candidates.role: modular concourse, kiosks and industrial hub shells
candidates.notes: Best hub-scale backdrop candidate for traversal lanes, ticketing, cargo and civic shells.

candidates.role: combat pods, barriers, enemy silhouettes and weapon props
candidates.notes: Strongest ready-made arena booster for duel lanes, hazard props and ops-grade sci-fi set dressing.
Use Poly Pizza catalog search for rigged robot / mech silhouettes. Good for non-final enemy mannequins before custom rigs land.

candidates.role: contract desks, claim terminals and corridor modules
candidates.notes: Best mission-quarter shell source for authored claim rooms and contract walkways.

candidates.role: operator desks, mission tracking and claim review stations
candidates.provider_label: Poly Pizza Dual Monitors on Sit/Stand Arm
candidates.notes: Use Poly Pizza catalog search for dual monitor / terminal desk props. Good for mission-side review stations.

candidates.role: vault shells, premium alcoves and route corridors
candidates.notes: Strong modular base for wallet link bays, payout tunnels and premium route rooms.

candidates.role: loot vault clutter, value props and payout staging
candidates.notes: Use Poly Pizza catalog search for sci fi crate / vault props. Immediate exchange filler for payout staging.

candidates.role: ops consoles, wall units and dispatch lanes
candidates.notes: Best ops-side candidate for console density and dispatch chrome without waiting for bespoke modeling.

candidates.role: runtime watch desks and operator terminals
candidates.provider_label: Poly Pizza Dual Monitors on Sit/Stand Arm
candidates.notes: Use Poly Pizza catalog search for dual monitor / control desk props. Fastest way to increase ops desk density.

candidates.role: industrial backrooms, catwalks and queue-processing shells
candidates.notes: Good for non-hero ops backrooms and queue-processing industrial depth.

candidates.role: district beacon and premium portal anchor
candidates.notes: Selected and downloaded as the first live hub beacon GLB bundle.

candidates.role: arena champion statue and duel-side silhouette anchor
candidates.notes: Selected and downloaded as a first arena trophy/hero silhouette placeholder.

candidates.role: claim engine, contract machinery and terminal core prop
candidates.notes: Selected and downloaded as a mission-side machinery anchor while authored claim terminals evolve.

candidates.role: premium artifact plinth and vault-value hero object
candidates.notes: Selected and downloaded as the first exchange artifact/vault centerpiece GLB.

candidates.role: ops-side console cluster and telemetry prop anchor
candidates.notes: Selected and downloaded as a first ops console placeholder GLB.
